purpose: Tier-1 trigger eval: does a query activate `qa-edge-hunter` (post-PASS exploratory edge hunting)? Hardest negatives are `spec-evaluator` (the verdict-giving 'QA') and plain unit-test requests.

cases.query: hunt edge cases on this feature
do an exploratory QA pass on the running app
the evaluator passed — what did it miss?
edge hunt before we ship this
run qa-edge-hunter on the checkout spec and the running app
evaluate TASK-007 against the spec and give a verdict
grade this build, does it pass?
implement the next task on the board
shape this feature before we build
orchestrate the whole build for me
write unit tests for this date-format utility
